author: James Hercher
title: Viant Had A Good Q4, But Still Needs To Punch Up At Bigger Platforms
description: Viant reported its Q4 and full-year 2025 earnings on Wednesday evening and investors appeared pleased. Net income last year was $24.1 million, almost double the total in 2024. Full-year 2025 revenue, meanwhile, grew by 22% to $110 million. CEO Tim Vanderhook …
content:
Viant reported its Q4 and full-year 2025 earnings on Wednesday evening, and investors appeared pleased.
